title: Register a new user and reach email verification step
description: Verifies that a user can submit the registration form with valid data and is sent to the verification step with a success confirmation visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /register.php
Fill Test into the first name field
Fill User into the last name field
Fill unique_test_user_001@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is redirected to the email verification page for the submitted email
Verify a registration success confirmation is visible

title: Reject registration using an already-registered email
description: Verifies the registration form shows an error when the email is already registered.

steps.description: Navigate to /register.php
Fill Existing into the first name field
Fill User into the last name field
Fill existing_user@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email already registered error is visible

title: Require all registration fields
description: Verifies the registration form prevents submission when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /register.php
Fill Test into the first name field
Fill User into the last name field
Leave the email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Leave the password confirmation field empty
Submit the registration form
Verify an all fields required error is visible

title: Enforce minimum password length on registration
description: Verifies the registration form shows a validation error when the password is too short.

steps.description: Navigate to /register.php
Fill Test into the first name field
Fill User into the last name field
Fill unique_test_user_002@example.com into the email field
Fill a password shorter than 8 characters into the password field
Fill the same short password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Verify a minimum password length validation error is visible

title: Reject non-matching password confirmation on registration
description: Verifies the registration form shows an error when password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /register.php
Fill Test into the first name field
Fill User into the last name field
Fill unique_test_user_003@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill a different valid password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Verify a passwords do not match error is visible

title: Reject invalid email format on registration
description: Verifies the registration form shows a validation error when email format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /register.php
Fill Test into the first name field
Fill User into the last name field
Fill invalid-email-format into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the password confirmation field
Submit the registration form
Verify an invalid email address error is visible

title: Verify email with valid token redirects to login with success message
description: Verifies that visiting the verification link with email and token results in a redirect to the login page and a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=valid_user@example.com&token=VALID_VERIFICATION_TOKEN
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Verify an email verified success confirmation is visible

title: Expired verification token shows an expiration error
description: Verifies that an expired token results in an expiration error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=expired_user@example.com&token=EXPIRED_TOKEN
Verify a verification link expired error is visible

title: Invalid verification token shows an invalid link error
description: Verifies that an invalid token results in an invalid verification link error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=some_user@example.com&token=INVALID_TOKEN
Verify an invalid verification link error is visible

title: Missing email parameter redirects to registration
description: Verifies that opening the verification page without an email parameter redirects to registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-otp.php
Verify the user is redirected to the registration page

title: Missing token parameter shows incomplete link processing state
description: Verifies that opening the verification page without a token shows an invalid or incomplete link indication.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=some_user@example.com
Verify an invalid or incomplete verification link message is visible

title: Login with verified credentials reaches dashboard with success confirmation
description: Verifies that a verified user can log in and lands on the dashboard with a success confirmation visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify a login success confirmation is visible

title: Reject login with incorrect password
description: Verifies that an existing email with a wrong password shows an authentication error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill wrong-password-123 into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid email or password error is visible

title: Unverified account login redirects to verification step
description: Verifies that logging in with an unverified account redirects to the email verification page for that email.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill unverified_user@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user is redirected to the email verification page for the submitted email

title: Session persists when navigating within the authenticated area
description: Verifies that after login, navigating away and returning within the same session still shows the dashboard without requiring re-login.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to another page within the authenticated area
Click the link to return to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard content for the signed-in user is displayed
